loadRoleId.body: {{ var hash = window.location.hash; var match = hash.match(/\/system\/role\/([^\/]+)\/permissions/); if (match) { ref_state_roleId.value = match[1]; } else { window.location.hash = '#/system/role'; return; } methods.loadData(); }}

loadData.body: {{ ref_state_loading.value = true; Promise.all([$_core_api.get('/api/role/' + ref_state_roleId.value), $_core_api.get('/api/permission-tree'), $_core_api.get('/api/role/all'), $_core_api.get('/api/role/' + ref_state_roleId.value + '/permissions/preview')]).then(function(results) { var roleRes = results[0]; var treeRes = results[1]; var rolesRes = results[2]; var previewRes = results[3]; if (roleRes.success) ref_state_roleInfo.value = roleRes.data; if (treeRes.success) { ref_state_permissionTree.value = treeRes.data; ref_state_expandedKeys.value = ['p1', 'm1', 'm2']; } if (rolesRes.success) ref_state_allRoles.value = rolesRes.data.filter(function(r) { return r.id !== ref_state_roleId.value; }); if (previewRes.success) { ref_state_previewData.value = previewRes.data.permissions; ref_state_stats.value = previewRes.data.stats; ref_state_inheritanceTree.value = previewRes.data.inheritanceTree; ref_state_currentPermissions.value = { pages: previewRes.data.permissions.pages || [], forms: previewRes.data.permissions.forms || [], fields: previewRes.data.permissions.fields || [] }; } ref_state_loading.value = false; }).catch(function(e) { console.error(e); ref_state_loading.value = false; }) }}

loadCompareResult.body: {{ if (!ref_state_compareRoleId.value) return; $_core_api.get('/api/role/compare', { params: { roleId1: ref_state_roleId.value, roleId2: ref_state_compareRoleId.value } }).then(function(res) { if (res.success) ref_state_compareResult.value = res.data; else $_antd.message.error(res.error); }); }}

findNode.body: {{ var nodes = args[0]; var key = args[1]; for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) { var n = nodes[i]; if (n.key === key || n.id === key) return n; if (n.children) { var f = methods.findNode(n.children, key); if (f) return f; } } return null; }}

onSelect.body: {{ var key = args[0] && args[0][0]; if (!key) { ref_state_selectedNode.value = null; return; } ref_state_selectedNode.value = methods.findNode(ref_state_permissionTree.value, key); if (ref_state_selectedNode.value && ref_state_selectedNode.value.type === 'field') { var fieldPerm = ref_state_currentPermissions.value.fields.find(function(f) { return f.fieldId === ref_state_selectedNode.value.id; }); if (fieldPerm) { ref_state_selectedNodePerm.read = fieldPerm.read; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.write = fieldPerm.write; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.hidden = fieldPerm.hidden; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.privacy = fieldPerm.privacy; } else { ref_state_selectedNodePerm.read = true; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.write = false; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.hidden = false; ref_state_selectedNodePerm.privacy = false; } } }}

handlePageCheck.body: {{ var node = args[0]; var checked = args[1]; if (checked) { if (!ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages.includes(node.code)) ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages.push(node.code); } else { var idx = ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages.indexOf(node.code); if (idx > -1) ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages.splice(idx, 1); } methods.updatePreview(); }}

handleFormCheck.body: {{ var node = args[0]; var checked = args[1]; if (checked) { if (!ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms.includes(node.code)) ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms.push(node.code); } else { var idx = ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms.indexOf(node.code); if (idx > -1) ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms.splice(idx, 1); } methods.updatePreview(); }}

handleFieldPermChange.body: {{ var fieldId = ref_state_selectedNode.value.id; var fieldCode = ref_state_selectedNode.value.code; var fieldName = ref_state_selectedNode.value.name; var existingIdx = ref_state_currentPermissions.value.fields.findIndex(function(f) { return f.fieldId === fieldId; }); var newPerm = { fieldId: fieldId, fieldCode: fieldCode, fieldName: fieldName, read: ref_state_selectedNodePerm.read, write: ref_state_selectedNodePerm.write, hidden: ref_state_selectedNodePerm.hidden, privacy: ref_state_selectedNodePerm.privacy, inherited: false }; if (existingIdx > -1) ref_state_currentPermissions.value.fields[existingIdx] = newPerm; else ref_state_currentPermissions.value.fields.push(newPerm); methods.updatePreview(); }}

updatePreview.body: {{ $_core_api.get('/api/role/' + ref_state_roleId.value + '/permissions/preview').then(function(res) { if (res.success) { ref_state_previewData.value = res.data.permissions; ref_state_stats.value = res.data.stats; ref_state_inheritanceTree.value = res.data.inheritanceTree; } }); }}

handleSave.body: {{ ref_state_saving.value = true; $_core_api.put('/api/role/' + ref_state_roleId.value + '/permissions', { permissions: ref_state_currentPermissions.value }).then(function(res) { if (res.success) $_antd.message.success('保存成功'); else $_antd.message.error(res.error || '保存失败'); }).finally(function() { ref_state_saving.value = false; }); }}

handleBatchAllow.body: {{ var type = args[0]; if (type === 'page') ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages = ['*']; else if (type === 'form') ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms = ['*']; methods.updatePreview(); }}

handleBatchDeny.body: {{ var type = args[0]; if (type === 'page') ref_state_currentPermissions.value.pages = []; else if (type === 'form') ref_state_currentPermissions.value.forms = []; methods.updatePreview(); }}

getNodeTypeText.body: {{ var type = args[0]; var map = { 'platform': '平台', 'menu': '菜单', 'page': '页面', 'feature': '功能', 'form': '表单', 'field': '字段' }; return map[type] || type; }}

getNodeTypeColor.body: {{ var type = args[0]; var map = { 'platform': 'blue', 'menu': 'green', 'page': 'orange', 'feature': 'purple', 'form': 'cyan', 'field': 'gold' }; return map[type] || 'default'; }}

getCompareStats.body: {{ if (!ref_state_compareResult.value) return { added: 0, removed: 0, common: 0 }; return { added: ref_state_compareResult.value.added.length, removed: ref_state_compareResult.value.removed.length, common: ref_state_compareResult.value.common.length }; }}

props.style: margin-bottom: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px

check.body: {{var node = args[0]; var checked = args[1]; if (node.type === 'page') methods.handlePageCheck(node, checked); else if (node.type === 'form') methods.handleFormCheck(node, checked);}}

children: 请从左侧选择一个节点进行配置
页面级权限开启后，所有子表单和字段默认继承可读权限
表单级权限开启后，所有子字段默认继承可读权限
字段级权限可以单独配置，覆盖继承权限
